scripts.ready: vp fmt && vp lint && vp run test -r && vp run build -r
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "vp run server#dev" "vp run client#dev"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "vp run server#dev" "portless run --name kodeck vp run client#dev"
scripts.tauri:build: pnpm --filter @kodeck/server build:sidecar && pnpm --filter @kodeck/desktop tauri build && node scripts/patch-app-bundle.mjs
